## Target branch

- [ ] Feature/fix/documentation work targets `dev`.
- [ ] Release or hotfix work targets `main`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Required checks pass.
- [ ] User-facing behavior or release impact is described.
- [ ] Version/changelog impact is considered.

## Release PRs

- [ ] `pyproject.toml` has the intended `project.version`.
- [ ] The release PR merges from `dev` to `main`.
- [ ] Any release-only changes will be backmerged to `dev`.
